Call to isspace with untrusted data from [string read by fgets](1).
Call to isspace with untrusted data from [string read by fgets](1).
This argument to a file access function is derived from [user input (a command-line argument)](1) and then passed to fopen(__filename).
A file may be created here with mode 0666, which would make it world-writable.
